name: 3Com Corporation
description: 3Com Corporation was a leading digital electronics manufacturer best known for its computer network products. Founded in 1979 by Robert Metcalfe and others, the company pioneered Ethernet technology and provided a wide range of networking solutions, including network interface cards, switches, routers, wireless access points, and IP telephony systems. 3Com was acquired by Hewlett-Packard in 2010 and subsequently integrated into HP's enterprise networking portfolio.
